arguments.argument: if checkScreenArea(x,y,48)=1 {playSound(global.snd_Flame1,0,0.92,50000)} var tEffect; tEffect=instance_create(x,y,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sMMSmokeCloud; tEffect.image_blend=c_maroon tEffect.image_speed=0.33; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=-3 tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=-100 instance_destroy()
